name: analyze-coverage-mcp
description: MCP Server that bridges LCOV coverage reports to AI agents

scripts.provision: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=$HOME/.local/bin/analyze-coverage-mcp && sed -i '' '1s|^|#!/usr/bin/env node\n|' $HOME/.local/bin/analyze-coverage-mcp && chmod +x $HOME/.local/bin/analyze-coverage-mcp && echo '[ok] analyze-coverage-mcp installed to ~/.local/bin'
